title: A Rainbow for Christmas
overview: Ezra is a young man navigating the complexity of family dynamics and self-acceptance. In a tense, yet intimate family Christmas gathering, Ezra decides to reveal a deeply personal truth to his parents: that he is gay. What follows is a powerful exploration of family, love, and the hope for acceptance, all unfolding within the heartwarming backdrop of the holiday season. As Ezra faces his fears of rejection and indifference, he discovers that love can come in unexpected forms. This emotional, uplifting story demonstrates that the spirit of Christmas is about more than just celebration-it's about understanding and unity.
